title: azalea roylei
intro: Azalea roylei, also known as the Himalayan azalea, is a species of flowering plant native to the Himalayas and the surrounding regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Azalea roylei include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of Azalea roylei can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
